entity.summary: Dynamic-liquidity-market-maker decentralized exchange and liquidity layer operating across MegaETH, Base, and Ethereum, with bin-based pools, dynamic swap fees, farms, curated non-custodial vaults, and active-liquidity strategies.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation presents SectorOne DLMM pools, farms, and vaults as products of one SectorOne exchange and liquidity-layer identity. Current independent metrics report non-zero spot volume, fees, and TVL across MegaETH, Base, and Ethereum. No exact launch date, legal entity, or jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: SectorOne protocol documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies SectorOne as a DLMM DEX and documents its pools, farms, vaults, active-liquidity design, and MegaETH deployment.

evidence.title: SectorOne DLMM protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Current independent metrics report non-zero spot volume, fees, revenue, and liquidity across MegaETH, Base, and Ethereum.
